dataset: TailwindTraders Azure DevOps Server project with seeded work items from data/work_items.json
case_id: Sprint 1 end-of-sprint release preparation for v1.5.0

pi_items.source: All 15 work items in data/work_items.json have areaPath='TailwindTraders'. The setup_azure_devops.ps1 post_start hook creates the TailwindTraders project via REST API.
setup_azure_devops.ps1 creates the TailwindTraders Git repo and pushes files from data/repo_files/. The setup_task.ps1 references $repoApi = '/TailwindTraders/_apis/git/repositories/TailwindTraders'.

This is a target the agent must create, not pre-existing data. setup_task.ps1 lines 40-51 delete any existing release/v1.5.0 branch. export_result.ps1 line 45 checks for 'heads/release/v1.5.0'. Branch name is consistent across all scripts.

The agent must add VERSION = '1.5.0' to config.py. Verified that data/repo_files/config.py contains NO existing VERSION field. The config dict has 'default': DevelopmentConfig which must be changed to ProductionConfig. export_result.ps1 checks regex 'VERSION\s*=\s*['"]1\.5\.0['"]'.
This is a value the agent must write into the wiki. export_result.ps1 line 191 checks regex 'March\s*22,?\s*2026'. Consistent between task.json description and export script.

data/work_items.json contains 8 items with iterationPath='TailwindTraders\Sprint 1'. setup_azure_devops.ps1 creates Sprints 1-4 with date ranges (Sprint 1: 2026-01-06 to 2026-01-19). setup_task.ps1 queries Sprint 1 items via WIQL: 'System.IterationPath UNDER TailwindTraders\Sprint 1'.

pi_items.metadata_value: Product price calculation returns incorrect values for bulk discount tiers
pi_items.verified_value: Product price calculation returns incorrect values for bulk discount tiers
pi_items.source: data/work_items.json entry: type=Bug, priority=1, iterationPath=TailwindTraders\Sprint 1, state=New (setup_task.ps1 sets to Active). This is a P1 Bug describing a < vs <= comparison bug in discount tier lookup. Tags: 'Pricing; P1-Critical; Sprint1'.

pi_items.metadata_value: Inventory count becomes negative after concurrent stock deduction requests
pi_items.verified_value: Inventory count becomes negative after concurrent stock deduction requests
pi_items.source: data/work_items.json entry: type=Bug, priority=1, iterationPath=TailwindTraders\Sprint 1, state=New (setup_task.ps1 sets to Active). Describes race condition in /api/v1/inventory/deduct with no row-level locking. Tags: 'Concurrency; Database; P1-Critical; Sprint1'. The bug is also referenced in data/repo_files/routes.py line 116 comment: '# BUG: No row-level locking - race condition under concurrent requests'.

pi_items.verified_value: Implement product inventory search with full-text filtering

pi_items.verified_value: API returns 500 error when filtering products with special characters in category name

pi_items.verified_value: Write integration tests for inventory deduction API endpoint
pi_items.source: data/work_items.json: type=Task, priority=2, Sprint 1. setup_task.ps1 sets state to Active (not in completedTitles or blockerTitles, falls to else branch). This P2 Task should NOT receive the release-blocker tag. Tags: 'Testing; API; Sprint1'.

privileged_info_summary: The TailwindTraders project in Azure DevOps Server has 8 Sprint 1 work items. After setup, 5 items are Resolved/Closed (completed): two P1 User Stories ('Implement product inventory search with full-text filtering' set to Resolved, 'Design REST API rate limiting and authentication middleware' set to Resolved), one P1 Bug ('API returns 500 error when filtering products with special characters in category name' set to Resolved — this is a FIXED bug, NOT a blocker), and two P2 Tasks ('Set up PostgreSQL database migration scripts for v2.0 schema changes' set to Closed, 'Configure CI/CD pipeline for automated testing and staging deployment' set to Closed). Two P1 Bugs remain Active and are the release blockers the agent must identify: 'Product price calculation returns incorrect values for bulk discount tiers' (P1, Active, tags: Pricing; P1-Critical; Sprint1) and 'Inventory count becomes negative after concurrent stock deduction requests' (P1, Active, tags: Concurrency; Database; P1-Critical; Sprint1). One P2 Task remains Active but is NOT a blocker: 'Write integration tests for inventory deduction API endpoint'. The agent must tag ONLY the 2 Active P1 Bugs with 'release-blocker' — not the Resolved P1 Bug, not the P2 Task. The config.py file on main has 'default': DevelopmentConfig and no VERSION field; the agent must add VERSION = '1.5.0' inside ProductionConfig and change default to ProductionConfig on the release/v1.5.0 branch. The wiki page must be titled 'Release v1.5.0' with sections '## Completed Items' (5 items), '## Known Issues' (2 blocker bugs), and '## Release Date' containing 'March 22, 2026'. Work item IDs are dynamically assigned by Azure DevOps Server at runtime and cannot be known in advance — the agent must discover them by navigating the Boards UI.
